Project.title: Project
Project.description: A secure vault containing the Telegram delivery link for a client.

clientEmail.description: The Google email of the client who is allowed to view this project.

title.description: The name of the project (e.g. 'Haute Horlogerie Campaign')

status.description: Current processing status of the project.

telegramLink.description: The direct Telegram download link for the completed files.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Stores client projects and secure delivery links.
